csvImport.title: Bulk import observations
csvImport.subtitle: Upload a CSV to record many observations at once. Strict mode: any row error rejects the whole batch.
csvImport.failureBanner: {{count}} row failed validation — no observations were inserted.
csvImport.failureBanner_other: {{count}} rows failed validation — no observations were inserted.
csvImport.failureHint: Fix the rows in your CSV and re-upload.
csvImport.limitsBulk: Bulk mode: max 50 MB / 50,000 rows · UTF-8 encoded

bulkMode.label: Bulk mode
bulkMode.tooltip: Allows up to 50,000 rows (50 MB). For backfills — requires admin privileges.

schema.title: CSV columns
schema.intro: One observation per row. Templated rows (set template_code + template_member_position) sharing the same template + observed_at + block + location are inserted as one grouped submission.

col.signal_code: Definition code (or, for templated rows, the member's definition code).
col.observed_at: ISO-8601 timestamp the observation was taken.
col.block_id: Block UUID; omit for a farm-level observation.
col.attachment_s3_key: Existing S3 key under this tenant's prefix (migration use).
col.template_code: Template code — set to record this row as part of a template submission.
col.template_member_position: 0-based member position within the template (required with template_code).

undo.confirm: Delete all {{count}} records from this import? This cannot be undone.

observationPanel.title: Signal observation
observationPanel.notFound: Observation not in the current overlay. Pick the matching signal in the overlay control.
observationPanel.templateLead: Lead row of a template submission

refPicker.title: Signal reference
refPicker.valueKeyLabel: Value column the reference resolves against
refPicker.empty: No signals defined in this tenant yet.
refPicker.unsupportedKind: Geopoint signals aren't predicateable — they can't be used in a condition reference.
refPicker.hint: Paste the snippet into the condition body at the spot you want.

config.title: Signal definitions
config.subtitle: Tenant-admin space: define what signal types your team can record (soil moisture, scout severity, irrigation events). For recording observations + CSV import, go to the Signals log.
config.empty: No signals defined yet — start with one for the data your team already records.

references.conflictBody: These live references will keep pointing at this signal after it's archived:

form.name: Display name
form.attachmentHint: Field operators can attach a photo when recording

templates.heading: Templates
templates.subtitle: Group several definitions to record them together (e.g. a soil-test panel).
templates.empty: No templates yet — create one to capture multi-value field forms.

memberPicker.label: Members (drag to reorder)
memberPicker.noMore: All active definitions are already in this template.

log.title: Signals — entry & log
log.subtitle: Record observations one at a time, or import many at once via CSV. They feed alerts, recommendations, and the dashboard.
log.noDefinitions: No signal definitions yet. Ask a tenant admin to define one in Configuration → Signals.
log.missingCapability: You need the {{capability}} capability on this farm to log observations.

form.outOfRange: Outside the expected range ({{bounds}}) — saved anyway.
form.downloadSampleHint: A small CSV pre-filled with this signal's columns and a few example rows. Edit it and import via the bulk uploader above.
form.errorLatLon: Latitude and longitude must be numeric.

observedAt.label: Observed at
observedAt.hint: Defaults to now if left blank — pick a past time for backdated entries.

location.label: Location
location.geoDenied: Couldn't get your location. Check the browser's location permission.
location.geoUnavailable: Geolocation isn't available in this browser.
location.needsBlock: Select a block first to pin a point inside it.
location.invalidLatLon: Enter a valid latitude (−90 to 90) and longitude (−180 to 180).

template.title: Template entry
template.subtitle: Record several signals at once.
template.empty: No active templates yet. A tenant admin can author one in Configuration → Signals.
template.noMembers: This template has no member definitions.
template.emptySubmission: Fill at least one member before submitting.

list.heading: Recent observations
list.capReached: Showing the most recent {{max}}. Narrow the filters to see older entries.

delete.confirmBody: This permanently removes {{count}} observation. This cannot be undone.
delete.confirmBody_other: This permanently removes {{count}} observations. This cannot be undone.

importHistory.title: Import history
importHistory.subtitle: Past CSV uploads for this farm. Deleting one removes every record it created.
importHistory.deleteConfirm: Delete all {{count}} records from this import? This cannot be undone.
